text:
お見事ね。結果も文句なしよ。
今回の特訓も問題なくクリア、ね。

これほどまでに教え甲斐のあった
アークスは貴方が初めてかもしれない。
礼を言わせてもらうわ。

一つ一つの動きの精度が段違い。
それは、長い研鑽でしか得られない
時間と努力の為せる技だから。

貴方にはさらに新しい世界を
見せてあげたい……
また会え

Wonderful. Most satisfying results indeed.
It seems you've once again
completed the boot camp without issue.

You might be the first student I've had who's
so quick on the uptake. I commend you.

You move with much more precision now.
Such finesse is undoubtedly the fruit of all
the time and effort you put into training.

Stick with me, and I will reveal to you an
untold world of martial mastery.
I hope to see you again.
